item.title: The unofficial uniform of "distracted."
item.description: The struggle is real. We all know the vibe when the grey sweatpants come out—it’s a collective test of self-control that nobody actually passes. Consider this your daily dose of relatable chaos.

media:content.media:title: The unofficial uniform of "distracted."
media:content.media:description: The struggle is real. We all know the vibe when the grey sweatpants come out—it’s a collective test of self-control that nobody actually passes. Consider this your daily dose of relatable chaos.

item.title: Kids’ Little Cough Gets a Laugh
item.description: Helpful advice for navigating the finance office during a car purchase, including paperwork, add-ons, and loan structure. What should buyers watch out for?

media:content.media:title: Kids’ Little Cough Gets a Laugh
media:content.media:description: Helpful advice for navigating the finance office during a car purchase, including paperwork, add-ons, and loan structure. What should buyers watch out for?
